title: Midnight Roasted Portuguese Almonds Stew
description: A smoky, buttery stew that blends roasted almonds, beurre-monte, and aromatic spices into a midnight snack that satisfies any craving.
instructions: Heat a kadhai over medium heat and add olive oil.
Add whole almonds and sauté until golden brown and fragrant.
Stir in smoked paprika, cumin, salt, and pepper and cook for 30 seconds.
Pour in vegetable broth, bring to a simmer, and let the mixture reduce for 10 minutes.
Fold in beurre-monte until the liquid thickens slightly and coats the almonds.
Add flaked almonds and stir gently to combine.
Cook for another 5 minutes until the stew is silky and the flavors meld.
Remove from heat and stir in lemon zest and chopped parsley.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve hot in bowls, optionally drizzled with additional beurre-monte or a splash of olive oil.
